title_en: PI, AI4Rad Lab · Assistant Researcher · Shanghai Sixth People's Hospital
title_cn: AI4Rad Lab 课题组 PI · 助理研究员 · 上海交通大学医学院附属第六人民医院
bio_en: Principal Investigator, AI4Rad Lab · Assistant Researcher, Department of Radiology, Shanghai Sixth People's Hospital, Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine. Ph.D. in Information and Communication Engineering from Shanghai Jiao Tong University (2024), supervised by Prof. Ya Zhang in the MediaBrain Lab. Research focuses on medical vision-language models and cross-distribution generalization of AI on clinical data.
bio_cn: AI4Rad 实验室课题组 PI、上海交通大学医学院附属第六人民医院放射介入科助理研究员。2024 年 6 月于上海交通大学获信息与通信工程博士学位，师从 MediaBrain 实验室张娅教授。研究方向聚焦医学视觉语言模型与临床数据跨分布泛化。
interests_en: Medical VLM — vision-language model pretraining, fine-tuning, and clinical diagnostic reasoning
Machine Learning — cross-distribution generalization of AI models on clinical data
interests_cn: 医学视觉语言模型 — 预训练、微调与临床诊断推理
机器学习 — 临床数据上的跨分布泛化

news_en.text: Paper accepted in npj Digital Medicine (SCI Q1, IF 15.2). Co-first author.
Paper accepted in IEEE Trans. Medical Imaging.
Paper accepted in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR).

news_cn.text: 一篇论文被 npj Digital Medicine 接收（SCI Q1, IF 15.2）。共同第一作者。
一篇论文被 IEEE Trans. Medical Imaging 接收。
一篇论文被 Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR) 接收。
